generatedScreen.title: Tramo - Operaciones de Energía Inteligente
generatedScreen.prompt:
Create a premium B2B landing page for Tramo in Spanish.

HEADER: 
- Logo: "Tramo" (text only, bold)
- Nav: Producto, Demo, Precio
- CTA: "Solicitar diagnóstico"

HERO:
- Left: Badge "12 pilotos activos", H1 "Convierte cada kWh de tu cartera turística en margen operativo.", subcopy "Tramo instala sensores en tus alojamientos, cruza reservas, CUPS, Datadis y tarifas, y te da el control sobre aparatos, tarifas y baterías desde una sola plataforma inteligente.", Primary CTA "Solicitar diagnóstico de cartera", Secondary CTA "Ver panel en vivo".
- Right: HTML/CSS LIVE PRODUCT PANEL. Features: 
  - "Ahora: 2.4 kW" with a teal pulse dot.
  - "VGO-014 · 4.2 kWh fuera de reserva · hace 2h" (alert style).
  - "Cargando · 0.08 €/kWh OMIE" (battery status).
  - "3 activas · próxima salida 11:00" (reservation status).

KPI BAR:
- 4 pills with metrics (e.g., 24/7 Monitoreo, -18% Gasto medio, 100% Automatizado, +12% Margen).

CORE MODULES (Alternating):
1. CONSUMO EN TIEMPO REAL: "Detecta fugas antes de que llegue la factura." Show a consumption gauge (Ahora vs Reserva), alert "4.2 kWh sin reserva activa · VGO-014", and benefit text.
2. TARIFAS & POTENCIA: "Cada propiedad con la tarifa y potencia óptimas." Show P1/P2 actual vs recommended comparison card. "Ahorro estimado: 180€/año por propiedad".
3. BATERÍA & ARBITRAJE: "Tus baterías trabajando cuando la red está cara." Show an OMIE hourly price chart (SVG sparkline) and battery cycle details (Carga 0.06€, Descarga 0.18€).

PAINS -> SOLUTIONS:
- 3 alternating rows showing visual evidence for Dashboard (Visibility), Tariff Comparison (Costs), and Auto-reports (Management).

SYSTEM FLOW:
- A horizontal visual flow: PMS/Reservas -> CUPS/Datadis -> Tramo -> Decisiones -> Informes.

PRODUCT PROOF:
- "Tramo en acción" with a high-fidelity dashboard preview.

LEAD FORM:
- Dark styled form (Spanish only). 
- Fields: Nombre, Empresa, Email, Nº alojamientos, Ciudad/Región, PMS, ¿Acceso Datadis/CUPS?, ¿Tiene baterías?, Dolor principal, Módulos de interés.
- CTA: "Solicitar diagnóstico de cartera".

FOOTER:
- Tramo · Madrid.

TECHNICAL SPECS:
- Dark mode (#080c0d).
- JetBrains Mono for numbers/metrics.
- Subtle amber (#f59e0b) and teal (#14b8a6) accents.
- Fine SVG visualizations.
- NO English text. NO leaf/eco/lightning icons. NO generic mockups.
generatedScreen.name: projects/500978887372057138/screens/aa828c505e1045c1b90c2b02214e3abf

theme.designMd:
---
name: Tramo Energy System
colors:
  surface: '#101415'
  surface-dim: '#101415'
  surface-bright: '#363a3b'
  surface-container-lowest: '#0b0f10'
  surface-container-low: '#181c1d'
  surface-container: '#1c2021'
  surface-container-high: '#262b2c'
  surface-container-highest: '#313537'
  on-surface: '#e0e3e4'
  on-surface-variant: '#d8c3ad'
  inverse-surface: '#e0e3e4'
  inverse-on-surface: '#2d3132'
  outline: '#a08e7a'
  outline-variant: '#534434'
  surface-tint: '#ffb95f'
  primary: '#ffc174'
  on-primary: '#472a00'
  primary-container: '#f59e0b'
  on-primary-container: '#613b00'
  inverse-primary: '#855300'
  secondary: '#4fdbc8'
  on-secondary: '#003731'
  secondary-container: '#04b4a2'
  on-secondary-container: '#003f38'
  tertiary: '#d4cac3'
  on-tertiary: '#352f2a'
  tertiary-container: '#b8afa8'
  on-tertiary-container: '#48423d'
  error: '#ffb4ab'
  on-error: '#690005'
  error-container: '#93000a'
  on-error-container: '#ffdad6'
  primary-fixed: '#ffddb8'
  primary-fixed-dim: '#ffb95f'
  on-primary-fixed: '#2a1700'
  on-primary-fixed-variant: '#653e00'
  secondary-fixed: '#71f8e4'
  secondary-fixed-dim: '#4fdbc8'
  on-secondary-fixed: '#00201c'
  on-secondary-fixed-variant: '#005048'
  tertiary-fixed: '#ebe1d9'
  tertiary-fixed-dim: '#cec5bd'
  on-tertiary-fixed: '#1f1b16'
  on-tertiary-fixed-variant: '#4c4640'
  background: '#101415'
  on-background: '#e0e3e4'
  surface-variant: '#313537'
typography:
  display-lg:
    fontFamily: Inter
    fontSize: 48px
    fontWeight: '700'
    lineHeight: 56px
    letterSpacing: -0.02em
  headline-md:
    fontFamily: Inter
    fontSize: 24px
    fontWeight: '600'
    lineHeight: 32px
    letterSpacing: -0.01em
  title-sm:
    fontFamily: Inter
    fontSize: 18px
    fontWeight: '600'
    lineHeight: 24px
  body-md:
    fontFamily: Inter
    fontSize: 16px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: 24px
  body-sm:
    fontFamily: Inter
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: 20px
  metric-lg:
    fontFamily: JetBrains Mono
    fontSize: 32px
    fontWeight: '500'
    lineHeight: 40px
    letterSpacing: -0.02em
  metric-md:
    fontFamily: JetBrains Mono
    fontSize: 16px
    fontWeight: '500'
    lineHeight: 20px
  label-caps:
    fontFamily: JetBrains Mono
    fontSize: 12px
    fontWeight: '700'
    lineHeight: 16px
    letterSpacing: 0.05em
rounded:
  sm: 0.125rem
  DEFAULT: 0.25rem
  md: 0.375rem
  lg: 0.5rem
  xl: 0.75rem
  full: 9999px
spacing:
  unit: 4px
  gutter: 16px
  margin-mobile: 16px
  margin-desktop: 32px
  container-padding: 20px
---

## Brand & Style

The design system is engineered for the high-precision world of energy technology and infrastructure management. It targets professional engineers, grid operators, and data analysts who require high-density information without cognitive overload. 

The aesthetic is **Technical Modernism**. It avoids the soft, rounded "friendly" tropes of consumer SaaS in favor of a rigorous, instrument-inspired interface. The UI should feel like a high-fidelity cockpit or a terminal, utilizing fine lines, precise measurements, and a structured layout that prioritizes data integrity and real-time monitoring. The emotional response is one of control, reliability, and technical sophistication.

## Colors

This design system utilizes a deep, atmospheric dark mode palette designed for long-duration monitoring sessions.

- **Fondo Principal (#080c0d):** A near-black base that minimizes eye strain and provides maximum contrast for data.
- **Contenedores (#131719):** Distinct surfaces for grouping technical widgets.
- **Acento Primario (#f59e0b):** "Energy Amber." Used for critical actions, active power states, and primary navigation.
- **Acento Secundario (#14b8a6):** "Metric Teal." Used for data visualizations, flowing currents, and stable system metrics.
- **Bordes Técnicos (#2a2520):** A subtle, warm metallic tint used for container outlines to provide structure without harshness.
- **Semántica:** High-visibility Red (#ef4444) for alerts/failures and Green (#22c55e) for efficiency/optimal states.

## Typography

The typography strategy is bifurcated between semantic communication and technical readout.

- **Inter** is used for all interface labels, paragraphs, and headlines. It provides a clean, neutral canvas that ensures legibility.
- **JetBrains Mono** is reserved for all numerical data, timestamps, coordinates, and technical statuses. Its monospaced nature ensures that numbers do not "jump" during real-time updates and aligns perfectly in data grids.

All technical labels (`label-caps`) should be set in uppercase with increased letter spacing to emulate industrial equipment markings.

## Layout & Spacing

The design system employs a **Fixed Grid** model on desktop (12 columns) and a fluid single-column model on mobile. 

- **Density:** High. Components should be compact to maximize the "at-a-glance" data density.
- **Rhythm:** Based on a 4px baseline grid. All padding and margins should be multiples of 4.
- **Data Grids:** Tabular data should use condensed vertical padding (8px) to allow for more rows per screen.
- **Breakpoints:**
  - Mobile: < 768px (Fluid margins)
  - Tablet: 768px - 1280px (24px margins)
  - Desktop: > 1280px (32px margins, 1440px max content width)

## Elevation & Depth

This design system rejects heavy shadows in favor of **Tonal Layering** and **Fine Outlines**.

- **Depth:** Surfaces are distinguished by their hex code (#131719) and a 1px solid border (#2a2520). 
- **Z-Axis:** Higher elevation (e.g., modals or dropdowns) is indicated by a slightly lighter surface tint (#1c2124) and a very subtle 8px blur shadow with 40% opacity of the background color.
- **Dividers:** Use 1px lines with #2a2520. For data-heavy tables, use hair-line dividers (0.5px) if the rendering engine supports it, or lower the opacity of the border to 50%.

## Shapes

To maintain a professional, technical appearance, the design system uses a "Soft" rounding approach. 

- **Base Radius:** 4px (0.25rem). Used for buttons, inputs, and small widgets.
- **Container Radius:** 8px (0.5rem). Used for primary cards and dashboard sections.
- **Sharpness:** Do not use fully rounded "pill" shapes for buttons or tags; keep them architectural and structured.

## Components

- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use a solid #f59e0b fill with black text for maximum contrast. Secondary buttons use a ghost style with a #2a2520 border and white text.
- **Data Viz:** Sparklines and charts must use a 1.5px stroke width. Use #14b8a6 for steady flows and #f59e0b for peaks or active consumption. Background grid lines in charts should be #1a1e20.
- **Inputs:** Dark backgrounds (#080c0d) with 1px #2a2520 borders. Focus state should switch the border to #f59e0b with no outer glow.
- **Chips/Status:** Use the JetBrains Mono `label-caps` style. Status indicators should be a small 6px solid circle next to the text.
- **Cards:** All cards must have a header section with a `label-caps` title and a 1px bottom border.
- **Technical Metrics:** Large numerical readouts should always be in JetBrains Mono, paired with a smaller unit label (e.g., "kW" or "kWh") in 50% opacity white.
